data.title: Create review-huge-diff-check.sh script
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Create `plugins/dso/scripts/review-huge-diff-check.sh` — a standalone script that counts changed files (excluding .test-index), and exits 2 when the count meets or exceeds review.huge_diff_file_threshold.

## Implementation
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
SCRIPT_DIR=$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)
_PLUGIN_ROOT=$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)

# Read threshold from config (default 20)
threshold=$(bash "$_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/read-config.sh" review.huge_diff_file_threshold 2>/dev/null)
threshold=${threshold:-20}

# Validate threshold
if ! [[ "$threshold" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] || [[ "$threshold" -le 0 ]]; then
  echo "review-huge-diff-check: invalid review.huge_diff_file_threshold: '$threshold' (must be a positive integer)" >&2
  exit 1
fi

# Count changed files, excluding .test-index
file_count=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^\.test-index$' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

if [[ "$file_count" -ge "$threshold" ]]; then
  exit 2
fi
exit 0
```

## Notes
- No DIFF_FILE argument: always calls `git diff --name-only HEAD` directly (same base as capture-review-diff.sh in REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 2)
- Uses _PLUGIN_ROOT from BASH_SOURCE (never hardcoded plugins/dso/ path)
- grep -v pattern is anchored: only excludes file named exactly '.test-index'
- exit 2 = threshold met or exceeded; exit 0 = below threshold; exit 1 = config error

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/review-huge-diff-check.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x applied)
- [ ] Uses _PLUGIN_ROOT from BASH_SOURCE (no hardcoded plugins/dso/ path)
- [ ] Validates threshold > 0; exits 1 with stderr on invalid value
- [ ] Excludes .test-index from file count (anchored grep pattern)
- [ ] Exits 2 when file_count >= threshold; exits 0 otherwise
- [ ] No DIFF_FILE argument accepted or required
- Verify: `bash tests/unit/scripts/test-review-huge-diff-check.sh 2>&1 | grep -c PASS` outputs 6
